# Touch Input

> Multi-touch and gesture input for mobile devices

**Category:** Integration · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** integration · godot

## What this does

Multi-touch and gesture input for mobile devices

Specifies 4 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Touch Detection** — when Detect touch screen input is requested, then Detect touch screen input completed.
- **Multi Touch** — when Handle multiple simultaneous touches is requested, then Handle multiple simultaneous touches completed.
- **Pressure Sensitivity** — when Read touch pressure if supported is requested, then Read touch pressure if supported completed.
- **Drag Gestures** — when Detect touch drag motion is requested, then Detect touch drag motion completed.
